scripts.demo:reset: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),y=require('js-yaml'); const c=y.load(fs.readFileSync('contract.yaml','utf8')); if(c.endpoints[0].response.price==='string'){console.log('Resetting price back to number...');} " && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const orig=fs.readFileSync('contract.yaml','utf8').replace('price: string','price: number').replace('SHOCK TEST','Product Catalog API'); fs.writeFileSync('contract.yaml',orig);" && ts-node compiler.ts
